thesis: Best joint momentum+revision name in the theme universe; sized below cap to respect a parabolic move.
falsification: A sharp price reversal (>20% drawdown from entry) or analyst revisions rolling from rising to falling would prove the move was a blow-off top, not a durable leg.

thesis: Confirmed-momentum mid-cap with cheapness as a margin of safety - the cleanest triple-confirm in the book.
falsification: Freight rates rolling over and revisions turning down together; a quarter of falling EPS estimates would break the thesis.

thesis: Liquid way to express the metals up-cycle with analyst revisions confirming; adds large-cap ballast.
falsification: Aluminium/alumina prices falling and revisions turning negative; loss of the momentum z-score lead over peers.

thesis: Core resources position confirmed by both price and revisions; demerger optionality.
falsification: Commodity rollover plus revision downgrades, or balance-sheet/governance shock at the group level.

thesis: Direct play on power-transmission capex with both signals confirming.
falsification: Order-book/revision slowdown or momentum z-score collapsing below peers.

thesis: High-revision industrial with confirming price action - electronics import-substitution theme.
falsification: Revisions decelerating or a momentum break; margin compression from component-cost inflation.

thesis: Confirmed-momentum auto-components name with structural content-gain story.
falsification: Auto-cycle slowdown plus revision downgrades; momentum z-score falling below peers.

thesis: Hold the existing power-equipment position; signals still confirm.
falsification: Revisions turning down or momentum stalling; order intake disappointing.

thesis: Confirmed-momentum chemicals name with upward estimate pressure.
falsification: Chemical-cycle pricing weakness and revision rollover; a momentum break.
